creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:

  Removed files:

  Log:
  I forgot to move pkg-message to files/pkg-message.in in previous commit:
          - update to 3.7 [1]
          - fix MASTER_SITES [1]
          - use SUB_FILES from pkg-plist [2]
  
          PR:             ports/107650 [1]
          Submitted by:   Takeshi MUTOH <mutoh@openedu.org> (maintainer) [1]
                          itetcu (me) [2]
  
  Submitted by:   maintainer
  Pointyhat to :  itetcu (me)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/lang/squeak/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.3       +0 -22     ports/lang/squeak/pkg-message (dead)
